Climate Change 1992: The Supplementary Report to the IPCC Scientific Assessment

Back to overview

[1] IPCC. Climate Change 1992: The Supplementary Report to the IPCC Scientific Assessment. Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, UK and New York, NY, USA and Oakleigh, Victoria, Australia, 1992.
